senses.definition: the food that we eat regularly during different times of day, such as breakfast, lunch, or dinner

examples.x: I cooked a delicious meal of grilled chicken with roasted vegetables.
On average, people consume three meals per day: breakfast, lunch, and dinner.
She ordered a takeaway meal of pizza and garlic bread for dinner.
She planned a romantic candlelit meal for their anniversary.
The meal was served buffet-style with a variety of dishes to choose from.

senses.definition: the first meal we have in the early hours of the day

examples.x: Breakfast plays an important role as it provides the body with the necessary energy and nutrients to start the day.
He had a toasted English muffin with scrambled eggs and a side of crispy bacon for breakfast.
She enjoyed a bowl of warm oatmeal topped with sliced bananas for breakfast.
The café served a delicious breakfast sandwich with eggs, cheese, and ham on a toasted bagel.
The children enjoyed a bowl of chocolate cereal with cold milk and a glass of orange juice for breakfast.

senses.definition: a meal we eat in the middle of the day

examples.x: I made a Greek salad with feta cheese and olives for a healthy and flavorful lunch.
Sarah and her friend had a bowl of pasta with marinara sauce and a side of garlic bread for lunch.
She packed a lunchbox with a turkey wrap, carrot sticks, and a yogurt cup for a balanced lunch.
Some people choose to skip lunch when they are busy or not feeling hungry.
The café served a delicious lunch special of grilled salmon with roasted vegetables.

senses.definition: the main meal of the day that we usually eat in the evening

examples.x: For dinner, I cooked a delicious chicken stir-fry with vegetables.
Gathering for dinner together as a family is a cherished tradition in our household.
They grilled hamburgers and hot dogs for a casual summer dinner.
They had a family dinner with a roasted chicken, rice, and steamed broccoli.
We ordered takeout pizza for an easy dinner.

senses.definition: a drink we make by soaking dried tea leaves in hot water

examples.x: The aroma of freshly brewed tea filled the room.
He offered his guests some tea with biscuits.

senses.definition: a drink made by mixing hot water with crushed coffee beans, which is usually brown

examples.x: He savored the aroma of freshly brewed coffee before taking his first sip.
I tried a new coffee blend with hints of chocolate and caramel.
She prefers her coffee black, without any sugar or cream.
The café served a variety of coffee drinks, including cappuccino and macchiato.

senses.definition: a sweet food we make by mixing flour, butter or oil, sugar, eggs and other ingredients, then baking it in an oven

examples.x: He baked a gluten-free almond cake for his friend with dietary restrictions.
He decorated a vanilla cake with colorful sprinkles for a festive celebration.
She enjoyed a slice of strawberry cake with whipped cream frosting.

senses.definition: a sweet baked treat typically made with flour, sugar, and other ingredients like chocolate chips or nuts

examples.x: I had a gluten-free cookie that was just as delicious as the regular ones.
I tried a vegan cookie made with plant-based ingredients and loved its taste.
The bakery offered a variety of cookies, including snickerdoodles and macadamia nut.

senses.definition: a type of food made from flour, water and usually yeast mixed together and baked

examples.x: I toasted a slice of bread and spread peanut butter on it for breakfast.
The bakery offers a variety of breads, including sourdough and whole wheat.
The children made mini pizzas using slices of bread as the crust.
They bought a loaf of freshly baked bread from the bakery for dinner.

senses.definition: a sweet, sticky, thick liquid produced by bees that is yellow or brown and we can eat as food

examples.x: He enjoys a spoonful of honey before bed to help calm his cough and promote a good night's sleep.
The honey produced by bees is not only delicious but also offers numerous health benefits.
They mix honey with yogurt and fresh fruits for a nutritious and delicious breakfast option.
We used honey as a natural remedy for soothing a sore throat.
We used honey as a natural sweetener in our homemade salad dressing.

senses.definition: a thick, sweet substance we make by boiling fruit with sugar and often eat on bread

examples.x: Can you pass me the jar of raspberry jam, please?
He spread jam on a slice of toast, folded it in half, and enjoyed a simple and tasty meal.
Let's make a peanut butter and jelly sandwich with lots of jam.
Sarah likes to make homemade jam from fresh fruits.
They packed peanut butter and jam sandwiches for a picnic.

senses.definition: the liquid inside fruits and vegetables or the drink that we make from them

examples.x: They mixed the juices of different fruits to create a delicious and colorful blend.

senses.definition: a sweet and cold dessert that is made from a mixture of milk, cream, sugar, and various flavorings

examples.x: I love eating a scoop of vanilla ice cream on a hot summer day.
She ordered a banana split with three different flavors of ice cream.
The ice cream truck played a catchy tune to attract customers.
The little boy eagerly licked his ice cream, trying to catch every last bit.

senses.definition: a liquid with no smell, taste, or color, that falls from the sky as rain, and is used for washing, cooking, drinking, etc.

examples.x: I accidentally spilled water on my laptop, and now it won't turn on.
I feel thirsty and need a sip of water.
It's important to stay hydrated by drinking enough water throughout the day.
The rain poured down, and the water quickly filled the streets.
The swimmer jumped into the pool and splashed water everywhere.

senses.definition: a small and short grain that is white or brown and usually grown and eaten a lot in Asia

examples.x: My mom cooked a delicious pot of rice to accompany our meal.
Rice pudding is a sweet dessert made with rice, milk, and sugar.
We had sushi for lunch, which was filled with rice and fresh fish.

senses.definition: a drink that is made by adding chocolate powder, syrup, etc. to milk

examples.x: Chocolate milk is my son's favorite drink to enjoy after school.
Every morning, I start my day with a glass of delicious chocolate milk.
The cafe offered a variety of flavored milk, including the popular choice of chocolate milk.
The children loved dipping their cookies into a glass of cold chocolate milk.
As a special treat, I added whipped cream to my chocolate milk for an extra touch of sweetness.

senses.definition: liquid food we make by cooking things like meat, fish, or vegetables in water

examples.x: I always garnish my soup with a sprinkle of fresh herbs.
I enjoy a warm bowl of chicken noodle soup when I'm feeling sick.
The chef prepared a creamy tomato soup for lunch.
The soup was so delicious that I had two servings.

senses.definition: a mixture of usually raw vegetables, like lettuce, tomato, and cucumber, with a type of sauce and sometimes meat

examples.x: She tossed the lettuce, carrots, and radishes together to make a colorful salad.

senses.definition: an Italian food made with thin flat round bread, baked with a topping of tomatoes and cheese, usually with meat, fish, or vegetables

examples.x: I added mushrooms, onions, and bell peppers as toppings on my pizza.
I like to dip my pizza crust in garlic sauce for extra flavor.
The pizza crust was thin and crispy, just the way I like it.
We enjoyed a pizza party with friends, eating slices and playing games together.

senses.definition: two pieces of bread with cheese, meat, etc. between them

examples.x: I made a delicious turkey and cheese sandwich for lunch.
My friend prefers a vegetarian sandwich with avocado and sprouts.
She wrapped the sandwich in foil to keep it fresh for later.
We packed sandwiches for our picnic in the park.

senses.definition: a sweet white or brown substance that is obtained from plants and used to make food and drinks sweet

examples.x: A teaspoon of sugar can sweeten your morning coffee or tea.
Freshly baked chocolate chip cookies are even more delicious with a touch of sugar.
I'm trying to cut down on sugar in my diet, but it's so hard.
The children enjoyed colorful cotton candy at the fair, made from sugar.

senses.definition: a natural, white substance, obtained from mines and also found in seawater that is added to the food to make it taste better or to preserve it

examples.x: Can you please pass the salt?
I added a dash of salt to the boiling water before cooking the pasta.
The chef sprinkled a pinch of salt to enhance the flavors of the soup.
The soup needed a little more salt to bring out the taste.
